title: SkillBehavioralTest
description: Lightweight behavioral test fixture for a skill vertical. Declares the skill under test, a compact scenario brief, the structural signals required in a correct output, and an optional reference example the validator checks offline against those signals.

skill.description: Kebab-case name of the skill under test. Must match the skill directory name.

brief.description: Compact scenario that would be handed to the skill.

referenceExample.description: Repository-relative path to an existing artifact the validator checks against requiredSignals. If absent, only fixture structure is validated.

check.description: Deterministic check type the validator runs against the referenceExample.

target.description: nodeTypePresent: node type name. fieldPresent/fieldCountAtLeast/fieldMatchesValue/allArrayItemsHaveField/fieldValuesInSet: dot-notation path.

minCount.description: Required for fieldCountAtLeast. Minimum array length.

expectedValue.description: Required for fieldMatchesValue. The exact expected value.

field.description: Required for allArrayItemsHaveField and fieldValuesInSet. Field name on each array item.

allowedValues.description: Required for fieldValuesInSet. Set of approved string values.

value.description: Legacy single-value field kept for antiPatternAbsent and rubricCriteria signals.
